data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. WHERE IS CHUNKY was responsible for a modest effort most recently when fifth at this track over 460m behind Hot Tub (26.82) in a Maiden. Placed at his previous run. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Looks the one to beat on his best form. 6. STAND NEAR has been settling off the speed lately, finishing sixth (27.14) last time in a Maiden at this track. Cannot be taken lightly. 3. HE'S ALL TALK comes off an average run last start when sixth at The Meadows over 525m behind Little Bont (31.05). Has ability and can measure up. 2. EXCEEDED was unplaced here when making debut but gets his chance to atone.","runners":[7,6,3,2],"exclusive":false}
